title: Knock On Wood
description: A mod that lets you knock on doors.
body:
A relatively simple mod that plays a knocking sound whenever you punch a door or trapdoor.

The sound is different depending on if the door is made of wood(openable by hand) or metal(requires redstone power).

**We plan on updating this mod to 1.21.1 and above. Fabric and Neoforge ports will be added later on.**
